document.title: Life Cycle Report for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life Cycle Report defining life-cycle basis and estimated service life for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Technical documentation record supporting life-cycle and risk management documentation for the listed detector models.
keyPoints: The document states that A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW have the same performance and usage except for size.
The power supply box part key identifies model DEPS9601 from Daean Elecom Co. Ltd.
Estimated life is calculated using a KMG Series capacitor basis from Samyoung Electronics.
The calculated capacitor estimated life result is 45,254.8 hours.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day, while reasonably foreseeable worst usage is 24 hours per day with a battery charger plugged in.
ESL is stated as about 5 years.

evidence.evidenceText: Life Cycle Report Rev. Date Oct/11/2022

evidence.claim: The report covers A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detectors.
evidence.evidenceText: Life Cycle Report for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The document states that performance and usage are the same except for size.
evidence.evidenceText: Performance and usage are all the same except for size. (A-TCF -5-127)

evidence.claim: The power supply box model is DEPS9601 supplied by Daean Elecom Co. Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Power Supply Box Model Name Photo Vendor DEPS9601 Daean Elecom Co. Ltd

evidence.claim: The life-cycle basis uses estimated life of a KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.
evidence.evidenceText: Estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.

evidence.claim: The capacitor estimated life calculation uses L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10).
evidence.evidenceText: Capacitor estimated life calculation L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10)

evidence.claim: The calculation assumes L0 of 1,000 hours, rated temperature of 105℃, and ambient temperature of 50℃.
evidence.evidenceText: L0: Life at rated temperature (hour) = 1,000 Hours Tmax : Rated Temperature (℃) = 105℃ Ta : Ambient Temperature (℃) = 50℃

evidence.claim: The calculated estimated life result is 45,254.8 hours.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day.
evidence.evidenceText: Average daily use : Less than 9 hours per day

evidence.claim: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is 24 hours per day with a battery charger plugged in.
evidence.evidenceText: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage : Using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in

evidence.claim: The estimated service life is about 5 years.
